name: Cardinal Parry
desc: Receives -20% damage from cardinal direction attacks (N, S, E, W).

name: Diagonal Parry
desc: Receives -20% damage from diagonal attacks.

name: Melee Parry
desc: Receives -20% damage from Melee attacks.

name: Magic Parry
desc: Receives -20% damage from Magic attacks.

name: Ranged Parry
desc: Receives -20% damage from Ranged attacks.

name: Dodge
desc: Receives -20% damage if able to step away from attack pattern. Once per Dodge per turn.

name: Resilient
desc: Receives -20% damage while below 50% Health.

name: Resolute
desc: Receives -20% damage while at full Health.

name: Sentinel
desc: Receives -20% damage when there are no allies in adjacent squares.

name: Fortify
desc: Receives -20% damage. Loses Fortified at start of next Turn. (Max 4)

name: Berserk
desc: Receives -50% damage during enemy turn after attacking in at least 3 directions.

name: Armor of Blood
desc: Receives -20% damage from bleeding targets.

name: Armor of Fire
desc: Receives -20% damage from Green attacks, immune to Green trait extra damage.

name: Armor of Earth
desc: Receives -20% damage from Blue attacks, immune to Blue trait extra damage.

name: Armor of Moon
desc: Receives -20% damage from Light attacks, immune to Light trait extra damage.

name: Armor of Sea
desc: Receives -20% damage from Red attacks, immune to Red trait extra damage.

name: Armor of Sun
desc: Receives -20% damage from Dark attacks, immune to Dark trait extra damage.

name: Bardic Song
desc: Supported allies receive -20% damage. Must be same Color as the Bard.

name: Chromatic Shield
desc: Immune to extra damage based on attacker's color.

name: Chromatic Song
desc: Supported allies immune to extra damage based on attacker's Color.

name: Shroud
desc: AI enemies ignore this character during movement phase.

name: Foresight
desc: Always takes minimum random damage from Elite, Paragon, Hero, Vicious.

name: Arcane Shield
desc: Immune to extra damage from Magic attacks.

name: Song of Blood
desc: Supported allies cannot receive Bleeding/Internal Bleeding.

name: Fire Resistance
desc: Immune to Burning status effect.

name: Cold Resistance
desc: Immune to Chilled/Frozen status effects.

name: Poison Resistance
desc: Immune to Poisoned status effect.

name: Bleed Resistance
desc: Immune to Bleeding status effect.

name: Natural Harmony
desc: Immune to all status effects.

name: Death Ward
desc: Survives a lethal hit with 1 HP. Once per battle.

name: Impunity
desc: Immune to status effects from attacks.

name: Immune to Disorientation
desc: Immune to Disorientation status effect.

name: Immune to Silence
desc: Immune to Silence status effect.

name: Immovable
desc: Cannot be pushed.

name: Aura of Terror
desc: Applies Terrified to adjacent and diagonally adjacent attackers.

name: Acid Resistance
desc: Immune to Acid status effect.

name: Curse Resistance
desc: Immune to Curse status effect.

name: Aura of Immobilize
desc: Applies Immobilized to adjacent and diagonally adjacent attackers.

name: Barrier
desc: Absorbs the next incoming attack, taking no damage. Removed after use.

name: Immune to Dazzled
desc: Immune to Dazzled status effect.

name: Immune to Demoralization
desc: Immune to Demoralized status effect.

name: Immune to Stun
desc: Immune to Stunned status effect.

name: Immune to Taunt
desc: Immune to Taunt status effect.

name: Immune to Withering
desc: Immune to Withering status effect.

name: Ironskin
desc: Receives reduced flat damage from all attacks.

name: Life Drain Immunity
desc: Immune to Life Drain effects. Attackers cannot heal from damaging this hero.

name: Reactive Armor
desc: Gains Fortified when hit by an attack.

name: Song of Acid
desc: Supported allies cannot receive Acid status effect.

name: Song of Cold
desc: Supported allies cannot receive Chilled/Frozen status effects.

name: Song of Fire
desc: Supported allies cannot receive Burning status effect.

name: Song of Poison
desc: Supported allies cannot receive Poisoned status effect.

name: Strongpoint
desc: Receives -20% damage when this hero has not moved this turn.

name: Blade On A Chain
desc: Pulls target 1 square closer after attacking.

name: Dark Bargain
desc: Sacrifices HP to deal extra damage.

name: Extra Time
desc: Gains an extra action point per turn.

name: Fire Walker
desc: Can walk through fire squares without taking damage.

name: Grappling Hook
desc: Can pull self towards obstacles or terrain.

name: Lick & Drag
desc: Pulls target towards self after attacking.

name: Ooze Exterminator
desc: Prevents Ooze enemies from splitting on death.

name: Pacify Beasts
desc: Beast enemies will not attack this hero.

name: Push
desc: Pushes target 1 square away after attacking.

name: Raider
desc: Can move 1 square after attacking.

name: Raider Boost
desc: Can move 2 squares after attacking.

name: Raider Surge
desc: Can move 3 squares after attacking.

name: Split Second
desc: Acts before other heroes in the same turn.

name: Taunt
desc: Forces adjacent enemies to attack this hero.

name: Trident & Net
desc: Immobilizes and pulls target after attacking.

name: Tumble
desc: Can move through enemy-occupied squares.

name: Water Walker
desc: Can walk on water squares.

name: Fleet-Footed
desc: Gains extra movement range.

name: Quick Attack
desc: Performs a quick attack with reduced damage.

name: Surge: Flying
desc: Can fly over obstacles and enemies during movement.

name: Cardinal Heal
desc: Heals allies in cardinal directions (N, S, E, W).

name: Critical Heal
desc: Chance to heal for extra amount on each heal.

name: Deadly Syphon
desc: Drains life from enemies and heals self.

name: Diagonal Heal
desc: Heals allies in diagonal directions.

name: Healing Aura
desc: Heals all adjacent and diagonally adjacent allies.

name: Healing Focus
desc: Increases healing amount when healing a single target.

name: Healing Ray
desc: Heals allies in a line from the healer.

name: Healing Touch
desc: Heals adjacent allies on contact.

name: Healing Wave
desc: Heals multiple allies in an area.

name: Inner Peace
desc: Heals self when not attacking.

name: Life Drain
desc: Regenerates HP equal to a percentage of damage dealt to living enemies.

name: Life Steal
desc: Steals HP from enemies on attack.

name: Lingering Heal
desc: Applies a heal-over-time effect to healed allies.

name: Meditate
desc: Heals self when no action is taken.

name: Pacifist
desc: Cannot attack enemies, but gains enhanced healing abilities.

name: Protector
desc: Takes damage in place of adjacent allies.

name: Refresh
desc: Removes negative status effects from healed allies.

name: Regrowth
desc: Regenerates HP at the start of each turn.

name: Revitalize
desc: Provides a large burst heal to allies.

name: Steady Heal
desc: Provides consistent healing each turn.

name: Syphon Life
desc: Drains life from enemies to heal self and allies.

name: Triage
desc: Prioritizes healing the lowest-HP ally.

name: Vampirism
desc: Regenerates HP from damage dealt to living enemies.

name: Initiative: Cure Poison
desc: When this character acts first, removes Poisoned from allies.
